'''zawufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmics|osmics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmics|osmics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zawufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæwifith|zæwifith]] || [[word:zæwifij|zæwifij]] || [[word:zæwifish|zæwifish]] || [[word:zæwifi|zæwifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawuwufuth|zawuwufuth]] || [[word:zawuwufuj|zawuwufuj]] || [[word:zawuwufush|zawuwufush]] || [[word:zawuwufu|zawuwufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawufuth|zawufuth]] || [[word:zawufuj|zawufuj]] || [[word:zawufush|zawufush]] || [[word:zawufu|zawufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawuffuth|zawuffuth]] || [[word:zawuffuj|zawuffuj]] || [[word:zawuffush|zawuffush]] || [[word:zawuffuf|zawuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zawufuthu|zawufuthu]] || [[word:zawufuju|zawufuju]] || [[word:zawufushu|zawufushu]] || [[word:zawufuku|zawufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zawufuth|zawufuth]] || [[word:zawufuj|zawufuj]] || [[word:zawufush|zawufush]] || [[word:zawufu|zawufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zawufuthul|zawufuthul]] || [[word:zawufujul|zawufujul]] || [[word:zawufushul|zawufushul]] || [[word:zawufukul|zawufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zawufuthuthu|zawufuthuthu]] || [[word:zawufujuju|zawufujuju]] || [[word:zawufushushu|zawufushushu]] || [[word:zawufuku|zawufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zawufuthun|zawufuthun]] || [[word:zawufujun|zawufujun]] || [[word:zawufushun|zawufushun]] || [[word:zawufukun|zawufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zawufuthuoro|zawufuthuoro]] || [[word:zawufujuoro|zawufujuoro]] || [[word:zawufushuoro|zawufushuoro]] || [[word:zawufukuoro|zawufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
